title: Talk about the video
prompt: Use one or two sentences to respond to this scene: First day of school, Gattu and Chinky were all said for their new school year, and both of them were brimming with excitement to go to school.
sample: First day of school, Gattu and Chinky were all said for their new school year, and both of them were brimming with excitement to go to school.

ja.prompt: 字幕の語を使って一、二文で答えてください。
ja.hint: 字幕の言葉を再利用してください。
ja.sample: First day of school, Gattu and Chinky were all said for their new school year, and both of them were brimming with excitement to go to school.

zh.prompt: 請用一到兩句回應這個情境。
